bodyText:
What is company secretary services? Company secretarial services — annual ROC filings, board resolutions, share transfers, director appointments, compliance calendar.
Company Secretary Services is a professional service offered by Virtual Auditor, an AI-powered CA and IBBI Registered Valuer firm (IBBI/RV/03/2019/12333) led by CA V. Viswanathan (FCA, ACS, CFE, IBBI RV), serving clients in Andhra Pradesh, Andhra Pradesh since 2012.
Quick Answer: CS Services in Andhra Pradesh — Company secretarial services — annual ROC filings, board resolutions, share transfers, director appo. From ₹5,000. Contact +91 99622 60333.

HEADING2: Company Secretary Services in Andhra Pradesh
Virtual Auditor provides company secretary services across Andhra Pradesh. With offices in Chennai, Bangalore, and Mumbai, we serve businesses throughout Andhra Pradesh with the same quality of FCA + ACS + CFE + IBBI RV-led professional services.
The ROC Hyderabad handles company registrations and filings for Andhra Pradesh. Stamp duty: 5% on authorised capital. Professional tax: ₹2,500/year.

HEADING2: Our Service Scope
• Annual ROC Filing (AOC-4, MGT-7)
• Board Resolution Drafting
• Director Appointment/Resignation (DIR-12)
• Share Transfer & Transmission
• Increase in Authorised Capital
• Registered Office Change
• Name Change (INC-24)
• Winding Up & Strike-Off

HEADING2: Why Virtual Auditor for Andhra Pradesh
Our founder CA V. Viswanathan holds four credentials — FCA, ACS, CFE, IBBI RV — which means your cs services is handled by the same qualified professional, not a rotating cast of junior associates.

HEADING2: Frequently Asked Questions

faqs.q: What is included in annual ROC filing?
faqs.a: AOC-4 (financial statements), MGT-7 (annual return), ADT-1 (auditor appointment). Due within 30-60 days of AGM.
Yes. DIR-12 for appointment/resignation, DIR-3 KYC annual update, DIN deactivation if needed.

faqs.q: What happens if ROC filings are delayed?
faqs.a: Additional fees of ₹100/day per form. Prolonged default can lead to company strike-off and director disqualification.

faqs.q: Do you provide cs services services in Andhra Pradesh?
faqs.a: Yes. Virtual Auditor serves clients across Andhra Pradesh from our offices in Chennai, Bangalore, and Mumbai. We handle the complete process remotely with in-person meetings available at our nearest office. Contact +91 99622 60333.

faqs.q: What is the ROC jurisdiction for Andhra Pradesh?
faqs.a: Companies registered in Andhra Pradesh fall under ROC Hyderabad. Virtual Auditor handles all ROC filings for Andhra Pradesh-registered companies.

faqs.q: What is the stamp duty for company registration in Andhra Pradesh?
faqs.a: Stamp duty in Andhra Pradesh: 5% on authorised capital. Professional tax: ₹2,500/year. Contact us for exact computation based on your authorised capital.
